titleZh: 上市公司信息披露暂缓与豁免管理规定
titleEn: Provisions on Deferred and Exempted Information Disclosure by Listed Companies
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 就国家秘密、商业秘密等情形下的信息披露暂缓与豁免建立统一监管框架，并压实上市公司内部决策、登记和后续核查义务。
summaryEn: Creates a unified framework for deferred and exempted disclosure where state-secret, commercial-secret, and similar concerns arise, while imposing internal approval, registration, and follow-up control duties.
